languages.text: "Приветствую, {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольный Торговец{/g}". {n}Эфир заполняется звучным голосом Эоганна.{/n} "Как известно, не существует неразрешимых дилемм — бывают лишь неправильные вопросы. Вы произвели на меня впечатление человека, который умеет задавать правильные вопросы, и потому я хотел бы пригласить вас поучаствовать в процессе моих научных изысканий. Почтите ли вы меня своей компанией в Секторе Бионика?"

traits.locale_text: "Приветствую, {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольный Торговец{/g}". {n}Эфир заполняется звучным голосом Эо-ганна.{/n} "Как известно, не существует неразрешимых дилемм — бывают лишь неправильные вопросы. Вы произвели на меня впечатления человека, который умеет задавать правильные вопросы, и потому я хотел бы пригласить вас поучаствовать в процессе моих научных изысканий. Почтите ли вы меня своей компанией в Секторе Бионика?"

languages.text: "Hail, {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}." {n}Eogunn's sonorous voice fills the channel.{/n} "As you know, there are no unsolvable dilemmas — only poorly formulated questions. You strike me as someone who knows how to ask the right questions, and so I would like to invite you to participate in my scientific research. Will you honour me with your presence in the Sector Bionica?"
languages.original_text: "Приветствую, {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольный Торговец{/g}". {n}Эфир заполняется звучным голосом Эоганна.{/n} "Как известно, не существует неразрешимых дилемм — бывают лишь неправильные вопросы. Вы произвели на меня впечатление человека, который умеет задавать правильные вопросы, и потому я хотел бы пригласить вас поучаствовать в процессе моих научных изысканий. Почтите ли вы меня своей компанией в Секторе Бионика?"

traits.locale_text: "Hail, Rogue Trader." {n}Eogunn's sonorous voice fills the channel.{/n} "As you know, there are no unsolvable dilemmas — only poorly formulated questions. You strike me as someone who knows how to ask the right questions, and so I would like to invite you to participate in my scientific research. Will you honour me with your presence in the Sector Bionica?"

"Hail, Rogue Trader." {n}Eogunn's sonorous voice fills the channel.{/n} "As you know, there are no unsolvable dilemmas — only poorly formulated questions. You strike me as someone who knows how to ask the right questions, and so I would like to invite you to participate in my scientific research. Will you honour me with your presence in the Sector Bionica?"

languages.text: {n}La voix sonore d'Eogunn retentit sur le canal-vox.{/n} « Salutations, {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}{mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}{/g}. Comme vous le savez, il n'existe pas de dilemme sans solution, seulement des questions inadéquatement formulées. Vous me donnez l'impression d'être quelqu'un qui sait poser des questions pertinentes, aussi aimerais-je vous inviter à participer à mes recherches scientifiques. Me ferez-vous l'honneur de me rendre visite dans le secteur Bionica ? »
languages.original_text: "Hail, {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}." {n}Eogunn's sonorous voice fills the channel.{/n} "As you know, there are no unsolvable dilemmas — only poorly formulated questions. You strike me as someone who knows how to ask the right questions, and so I would like to invite you to participate in my scientific research. Will you honour me with your presence in the Sector Bionica?"

traits.locale_text: {n}La voix sonore d'Eogunn retentit sur le canal-vox.{/n} « Salutations, {mf|{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}libre-marchand{/g}|libre-marchande}. Comme vous le savez, il n'existe pas de dilemme sans solution, seulement des questions inadéquatement formulées. Vous me donnez l'impression d'être quelqu'un qui sait poser des questions pertinentes, aussi aimerais-je vous inviter à participer à mes recherches scientifiques. Me ferez-vous l'honneur de me rendre visite dans le secteur Bionica ? »

languages.text: «Saludos, {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Comerciante Independiente{/g}». {n}La sonora voz de Eogunn cubre el canal.{/n} «Como ya sabe, no hay dilemas irresolubles, solo preguntas mal formuladas. Me da la impresión de que usted sabe hacer las preguntas correctas, de modo que quiero extenderle una invitación para participar en mi investigación científica. ¿Me honrará con su presencia en el sector Bionica?».
languages.original_text: "Hail, {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}." {n}Eogunn's sonorous voice fills the channel.{/n} "As you know, there are no unsolvable dilemmas — only poorly formulated questions. You strike me as someone who knows how to ask the right questions, and so I would like to invite you to participate in my scientific research. Will you honour me with your presence in the Sector Bionica?"

traits.locale_text: «Saludos, {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Comerciante Independiente{/g}». {n}La sonora voz de Eogunn cubre el canal.{/n} «Como ya sabe, no hay dilemas irresolubles, solo preguntas mal formuladas. Me da la impresión de que usted sabe hacer las preguntas correctas, de modo que quiero extenderle una invitación para participar en mi investigación científica. ¿Me honrará con su presencia en el sector Bionica?».

languages.text: “向您致敬，{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}行商浪人{/g}。”{n}伊奥贡洪亮的声音响彻通讯频道。{/n}“您知道的，世上没有无法解决的难题，只有拙劣的提问。而您，显然深谙提问之道。所以，我在此邀请您参与我的科学研究。您愿意赏光莅临仿生区吗？”
languages.original_text: "Hail, {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}." {n}Eogunn's sonorous voice fills the channel.{/n} "As you know, there are no unsolvable dilemmas — only poorly formulated questions. You strike me as someone who knows how to ask the right questions, and so I would like to invite you to participate in my scientific research. Will you honour me with your presence in the Sector Bionica?"

traits.locale_text: “向您致敬，{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}行商浪人{/g}。”{n}伊奥贡洪亮的声音响彻通讯频道。{/n}“您知道的，世上没有无法解决的难题，只有拙劣的提问。而您，显然深谙提问之道。所以，我在此邀请您参与我的科学研究。您愿意赏光莅临仿生区吗？”

languages.text: "Seid gegrüßt, {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}{mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}{/g}." {n}Eogunns volltönende Stimme erfüllt den Kanal.{/n} "Wie Ihr wisst, gibt es keine unlösbaren Dilemmata ... nur schlecht formulierte Fragen. Ihr scheint mir jemand zu sein, der die richtigen Fragen zu stellen weiß, deshalb möchte ich Euch einladen, Euch an meiner wissenschaftlichen Forschung zu beteiligen. Werdet Ihr mich mit Eurer Anwesenheit im Sektor Bionica beehren?"
languages.original_text: "Hail, {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}." {n}Eogunn's sonorous voice fills the channel.{/n} "As you know, there are no unsolvable dilemmas — only poorly formulated questions. You strike me as someone who knows how to ask the right questions, and so I would like to invite you to participate in my scientific research. Will you honour me with your presence in the Sector Bionica?"

traits.locale_text: "Seid gegrüßt, {mf|{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Freihändler{/g}|Freihändlerin}." {n}Eogunns volltönende Stimme erfüllt den Kanal.{/n} "Wie Ihr wisst, gibt es keine unlösbaren Dilemmata ... nur schlecht formulierte Fragen. Ihr scheint mir jemand zu sein, der die richtigen Fragen zu stellen weiß, deshalb möchte ich Euch einladen, Euch an meiner wissenschaftlichen Forschung zu beteiligen. Werdet Ihr mich mit Eurer Anwesenheit im Sektor Bionica beehren?"

languages.text: "{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Hür Tacir'e{/g} selam olsun." {n}Eogunn'un gür sesi, kanalı dolduruyor.{/n} "Bildiğiniz gibi çözülemeyecek ikilem diye bir şey yoktur, sadece kötü formüle edilmiş sorular vardır. Bana doğru soruları nasıl soracağını bilen biri gibi göründünüz, bu yüzden sizi bilimsel araştırmama katılmaya davet etmek istiyorum. Sektör Biyonika'da varlığınızla beni onurlandırır mısınız?"
languages.original_text: "Hail, {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}." {n}Eogunn's sonorous voice fills the channel.{/n} "As you know, there are no unsolvable dilemmas — only poorly formulated questions. You strike me as someone who knows how to ask the right questions, and so I would like to invite you to participate in my scientific research. Will you honour me with your presence in the Sector Bionica?"

traits.locale_text: "{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Hür Tacir'e{/g} selam olsun." {n}Eogunn'un gür sesi, kanalı dolduruyor.{/n} "Bildiğiniz gibi çözülemeyecek ikilem diye bir şey yoktur, sadece kötü formüle edilmiş sorular vardır. Bana doğru soruları nasıl soracağını bilen biri gibi göründünüz, bu yüzden sizi bilimsel araştırmama katılmaya davet etmek istiyorum. Sektör Biyonika'da varlığınızla beni onurlandırır mısınız?"

languages.text: 「お会いできて光栄です、{mf|殿|殿}」{n}エオガンの雄々しい声がチャネルに響く。{/n}「先日の会話で、貴方の論理の立て方、論理の展開に感銘を受けました。科学研究に貴方を助手に加えていただきたいのです」
languages.original_text: "Hail, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Eogunn's sonorous voice fills the channel.{/n} "During our last conversation, I was struck by your manner of disputation, and I wish to invite you to participate in my scientific research. As my assistant, of course."
